org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism.AbstractPropertyTooler

    • Uses of AbstractPropertyTooler in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.anchor

      Subclasses of AbstractPropertyTooler in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.anchor 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  AbstractEllipsoidAnchorFigure<A extends Anchor<?,?,?,?>>
      This figure is for all the anchor figures based on ellipsoid.
      class  AbstractRectangularAnchorFigure<A extends Anchor<?,?,?,?>>
      This figure is for all the rectangular or squared anchor figures.
      class  AnchorFigure<A extends Anchor<?,?,?,?>>
      This is the anchor that permit to connect EdgeFigure and NodeFigure.
      class  InvisibleCircleAnchorFigure<A extends Anchor<?,?,?,?>>
      This figure is for an anchor that is not drawn in its inactive state, and the activated side of the anchor is drawn along a circle frame.
      class  InvisibleEllipsoidAnchorFigure<A extends Anchor<?,?,?,?>>
      This figure is for an anchor that is not drawn in its inactive state, and the activated side of the anchor is drawn along a ellipsoid frame.
      class  InvisibleRectangularAnchorFigure<A extends Anchor<?,?,?,?>>
      This figure is for an anchor that is not drawn in its inactive state, and the activated side of the anchor is drawn along a rectangle frame.
      class  InvisibleRoundRectangularAnchorFigure<A extends Anchor<?,?,?,?>>
      This figure is for an anchor that is not drawn in its inactive state, and the activated side of the anchor is drawn along a round rectangle frame.
      class  InvisibleSquareAnchorFigure<A extends Anchor<?,?,?,?>>
      This figure is for an anchor that is not drawn in its inactive state, and the activated side of the anchor is drawn along a square frame.

    • Uses of AbstractPropertyTooler in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure

      Subclasses of AbstractPropertyTooler in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  AbstractFigure
      This class is the base class for basic drawing objects such as rectangles, lines, text, circles, etc.
      class  AbstractModelObjectFigure<M extends ModelObject>
      This class is the base class for graphical representation of model elements.

    • Uses of AbstractPropertyTooler in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.coercion

      Subclasses of AbstractPropertyTooler in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.coercion 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  CoercedBitmapFigure
      Bitmap Figure that is associated to an anchor and located according to the anchor position.
      class  CoercedTextFigure
      Text Figure that is associated to an anchor and located according to the anchor position.

    • Uses of AbstractPropertyTooler in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.decoration

      Subclasses of AbstractPropertyTooler in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.decoration 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  BitmapFigure
      A decoration figure that is drawing a bitmap.
      class  BlockDecorationFigure
      Abstract class to present a decoration figure as a block.
      class  DecorationFigure
      Abstract class to present a decoration figure.
      class  EllipseFigure
      A decoration figure that is drawing an ellipse.
      class  PolylineFigure
      A decoration figure that is drawing a polyline.
      class  RectangleFigure
      A decoration figure that is drawing a rectangle.
      class  TextFigure
      A decoration figure that is drawing a text.

    • Uses of AbstractPropertyTooler in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.edge

      Subclasses of AbstractPropertyTooler in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.edge 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  EdgeFigure<E extends Edge<?,?,?,?>>
      Abstract Figure classe for representing edges between nodes' ports.
      class  PolylineEdgeFigure<E extends Edge<?,?,?,?>>
      Edge that is drawn with a polyline.
      class  SegmentEdgeFigure<E extends Edge<?,?,?,?>>
      Edge that is drawn with a single segment.

    • Uses of AbstractPropertyTooler in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.edge.symbol

      Subclasses of AbstractPropertyTooler in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.edge.symbol 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  AbstractFillableEdgeSymbol
      This class represents a edge symbol that is able to fill its interior part.
      class  ArrowEdgeSymbol
      This class represents the "arrow" symbol that will be paint in the ends of edges.
      class  CircleEdgeSymbol
      This class represents the "circle" symbols that will be paint in the ends of edges.
      class  DiamondEdgeSymbol
      This class represents the "diamond" symbol that will be paint in the ends of edges.
      class  EdgeSymbol
      This class is the base class for the symbols that will be paint at the ends of edges.
      class  RectangleEdgeSymbol
      This class represents the "rectangle" symbols that will be paint in the ends of edges.
      class  SlotInEdgeSymbol
      This class represents the "slot-in" symbols that will be paint in the ends of edges.
      class  SlotOutEdgeSymbol
      This class represents the "slot-out" symbols that will be paint in the ends of edges.
      class  TriangleEdgeSymbol
      This class represents the "triangle" symbol that will be paint in the ends of edges.

    • Uses of AbstractPropertyTooler in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.node

      Subclasses of AbstractPropertyTooler in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.node 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  BitmapNodeFigure<N extends Node<?,? super N,? super A,?>,A extends Anchor<?,? super N,? super A,?>>
      Node figure that is displaying a bitmap.
      class  CircleNodeFigure<N extends Node<?,? super N,? super A,?>,A extends Anchor<?,? super N,? super A,?>>
      Node figure that is displaying a circle.
      class  EllipseNodeFigure<N extends Node<?,? super N,? super A,?>,A extends Anchor<?,? super N,? super A,?>>
      Node figure that is displaying an ellipse.
      class  NodeFigure<N extends Node<?,? super N,? super A,?>,A extends Anchor<?,? super N,? super A,?>>
      Abstract class to present a node in a diagram.
      class  RectangleNodeFigure<N extends Node<?,? super N,? super A,?>,A extends Anchor<?,? super N,? super A,?>>
      Node figure that is displaying a rectangle.
      class  RoundRectangleNodeFigure<N extends Node<?,? super N,? super A,?>,A extends Anchor<?,? super N,? super A,?>>
      Node figure that is displaying a round rectangle.
      class  SquareNodeFigure<N extends Node<?,? super N,? super A,?>,A extends Anchor<?,? super N,? super A,?>>
      Node figure that is displaying a square.

    • Uses of AbstractPropertyTooler in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.subfigure

      Subclasses of AbstractPropertyTooler in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.subfigure 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  AbstractModelObjectSubFigure<M extends ModelObject>
      This class is the base class for graphical representation of model elements.
      class  AbstractSubFigure
      This class is the base class all the figures that are linked to other figures such as the anchors inside the nodes.

      Subclasses of AbstractPropertyTooler in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.view 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  AbstractViewComponent
      This class is the base class for all the drawable components.

    • Uses of AbstractPropertyTooler in org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism

      Subclasses of AbstractPropertyTooler in org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  AbstractAnchor<G extends Graph<?,N,A,E>,N extends Node<G,?,A,E>,A extends Anchor<G,N,?,E>,E extends Edge<G,N,A,?>>
      This is the Anchor that permit to connect Edges and Nodes.
      class  AbstractEdge<G extends Graph<?,N,A,E>,N extends Node<G,?,A,E>,A extends Anchor<G,N,?,E>,E extends Edge<G,N,A,?>>
      Abstract ModelObject classe for representing edges between anchors.
      class  AbstractModelObject
      This is the semantic object that composes a graph model.
      class  AbstractNode<G extends Graph<?,N,A,E>,N extends Node<G,?,A,E>,A extends Anchor<G,N,?,E>,E extends Edge<G,N,A,?>>
      This is the semantic object for nodes.

    • Uses of AbstractPropertyTooler in org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism.standard

      Subclasses of AbstractPropertyTooler in org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism.standard 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  AbstractStandardNode<G extends StandardGraph<G,N,A,E>,N extends AbstractStandardNode<G,N,A,E>,A extends StandardAnchor<G,N,A,E>,E extends StandardEdge<G,N,A,E>>
      Define an node with the standard implementation.
      class  StandardAnchor<G extends StandardGraph<G,N,A,E>,N extends AbstractStandardNode<G,N,A,E>,A extends StandardAnchor<G,N,A,E>,E extends StandardEdge<G,N,A,E>>
      Define an anchor with the standard implementation.
      class  StandardEdge<G extends StandardGraph<G,N,A,E>,N extends AbstractStandardNode<G,N,A,E>,A extends StandardAnchor<G,N,A,E>,E extends StandardEdge<G,N,A,E>>
      Define an edge with the standard implementation.
      class  StandardGraph<G extends StandardGraph<G,N,A,E>,N extends AbstractStandardNode<G,N,A,E>,A extends StandardAnchor<G,N,A,E>,E extends StandardEdge<G,N,A,E>>
      Define a graph with the standard implementation.
      class  StandardMonoAnchorNode<G extends StandardGraph<G,N,A,E>,N extends AbstractStandardNode<G,N,A,E>,A extends StandardAnchor<G,N,A,E>,E extends StandardEdge<G,N,A,E>>
      Define an node with at max one central anchor with the standard implementation.
      class  StandardMultiAnchorNode<G extends StandardGraph<G,N,A,E>,N extends StandardMultiAnchorNode<G,N,A,E>,A extends StandardAnchor<G,N,A,E>,E extends StandardEdge<G,N,A,E>>
      Define an node with the standard implementation.

    • Uses of AbstractPropertyTooler in org.arakhne.neteditor.fsm.constructs

      Subclasses of AbstractPropertyTooler in org.arakhne.neteditor.fsm.constructs 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  AbstractFSMNode
      Abstract implementation for all the nodes that are composed a FSM.
      class  FiniteStateMachine
      Define a finite state machine.
      class  FSMAnchor
      Define an node's anchor in a finite state machine.
      class  FSMEndPoint
      Define an end point in a finite state machine.
      class  FSMStartPoint
      Define the start point in a finite state machine.
      class  FSMState
      Define a state in a finite state machine.
      class  FSMTransition
      Define a transition in a finite state machine.

    • Uses of AbstractPropertyTooler in org.arakhne.neteditor.fsm.figures

      Subclasses of AbstractPropertyTooler in org.arakhne.neteditor.fsm.figures 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  FSMEndPointFigure
      Figure for the end points of the FSM.
      class  FSMStartPointFigure
      Figure for the start points of the FSM.
      class  FSMStateFigure
      Figure for the nodes of the FSM.
      class  FSMTransitionFigure
      Figure for the transitions of the FSM.
